description: Hermes-like agent that builds a source-backed knowledgebase for top 100 U.S. universities, their majors, and applicant expectations.
next_steps: Raise majors coverage from 90/100 toward full top-100 coverage
Target remaining blocked or JS-heavy majors pages such as Michigan, UC Berkeley, Michigan State, WashU, and Florida State
Improve faculty verification to use official school pages instead of RateMyProfessors-derived fallbacks where possible
Improve alumni recency and per-major filtering in the generic enrichment pipeline
